trade.summary: The United States is Italy's largest single-country export market outside the EU. Italy runs a significant trade surplus with the US. Italy exports machinery, pharmaceuticals, luxury goods, food and wine, and vehicles; the US exports aircraft, energy, pharmaceuticals, and technology. Italian goods have strong brand recognition in American consumer markets. US tariff threats under the Trump administration in 2025 created concerns for Italy's export-dependent sectors.
disputes: US tariff threats on EU goods (2025)

diplomatic.summary: Italy is a close US ally within NATO and the G7. The Meloni government, despite its right-wing populist orientation, has maintained a firmly pro-Western and pro-US stance, distancing itself from the pro-Russia and anti-NATO postures of some European far-right parties. US-Italy relations are particularly close under the Trump administration due to ideological affinity between Meloni and Trump. Italy hosted a G7 summit in 2024 under Meloni's presidency.
recent_incidents: Trade tensions over US tariff proposals 2025

military.summary: Italy is a key NATO ally and hosts major US military bases (Aviano, Sigonella, Vicenza, and others). Italy is one of the largest US military presence locations in Europe. Italy participates in F-35 program, Joint Strike Fighter production, and various NATO operations. US-Italy military cooperation is deep and extensive. Italy contributes to US-led coalitions globally.

financial.summary: Major bilateral investment. US companies (tech, pharma, consumer goods) have substantial Italian operations. Italian luxury conglomerates (Stellantis, Luxottica/EssilorLuxottica, Prada, Ferrari) are listed in New York or have major US market presence. Wall Street investment in Italian sovereign debt is significant. US private equity is active in Italian mid-market M&A.

energy.summary: The US has become Italy's leading LNG supplier since Russia's invasion of Ukraine prompted Italian energy diversification. US LNG terminals now supply a significant portion of Italy's gas imports. ENI and major US energy companies have commercial partnerships globally.

scientific.summary: Extremely strong scientific partnership. Italian and American researchers collaborate across all major fields. NASA and the Italian Space Agency (ASI) have deep cooperation including on the International Space Station. Major US universities have Italian faculty and Italian students. Joint research through NSF-CNR agreements is extensive.
